Alistar.trading_pattern: Brand's poke dominates Alistar early. Keep distance and space.
Alistar.ability_to_dodge: Alistar E (Trample) — dodge by moving away, use W for defense.

power_spikes.you: Level 1-2 with Q poke, Level 6 with ultimate burst
power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 with ultimate lockdown, completed Mandate

Alistar.early_game: Dominate with constant poke. Don't let him all-in.
Alistar.mid_game: Brand maintains pressure through utility and burst.
Alistar.late_game: Alistar's utility scales well but Brand's burst remains threatening.
Alistar.win_condition: Maintain poke pressure, avoid his engage, leverage burst in fights.
Alistar.positioning: Keep distance from his engage range. Position for W setup.

Bard.trading_pattern: Brand's early poke beats Bard's utility. Pressure hard.
Bard.ability_to_dodge: Bard Q (Cosmic Binding) — dodge by moving sideways.

power_spikes.you: Level 1-2 with Q poke, Level 6 with ultimate burst
power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 with Magical Journey, chime scaling

Bard.early_game: Dominate with poke. Keep him zoned.
Bard.mid_game: Bard's roaming catches up. Both scale similarly.
Bard.late_game: Bard's utility and roaming provide advantage.
Bard.win_condition: Maintain early pressure, prevent his roaming, build lead.
Bard.scaling: Even — Bard scales through roaming, Brand through burst
Bard.positioning: Keep distance and position for W setup.

Brand.trading_pattern: Mirror matchup where positioning and W placement matter most.
Brand.ability_to_dodge: Brand Q (Sear) — dodge by moving sideways.

power_spikes.you: Level 1-2 with Q poke, Level 6 with ultimate burst
power_spikes.enemy: Same as you — scaling is identical

Brand.early_game: Trade with careful positioning. W placement determines trades.
Brand.mid_game: Both scale identically. Skill and team coordination matter.
Brand.late_game: Whoever has better positioning and combo timing wins.
Brand.win_condition: Better W placement, superior combo timing, team execution.
Brand.scaling: Perfectly even — identical in every way
Brand.positioning: Mirror opponent's spacing. Execute combos better.
